name: Crunchy, Munchy Crackers
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Rolled oats or barley flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine oats, barley flour, salt, water, and oil. Mix thoroughly.
3. Shape the dough into a rectangle and roll it paper-thin on a lightly greased, rimless baking sheet.
4. Moisten the surface of the rolled dough with a damp pastry brush.
5. Sprinkle sesame seeds evenly over the dough.
6. Roll the dough again to press the seeds into the surface.
7. Using a knife or pizza cutter, cut the dough into 1-inch squares.
8. Bake until thoroughly dry and slightly brown, about 40 minutes.
